headlines.title_cn: Apple opens its new Siri AI to everyone with the iOS 27 public beta
headlines.title_en: Apple opens its new Siri AI to everyone with the iOS 27 public beta
headlines.summary_cn: If you’ve been waiting to try Apple’s revamped Siri without installing a developer beta, you now can. The company on Tuesday released the iOS 27 public beta, giving iPhone owners early access to its AI-powered assistant and other new features before the software’s official launch this fall.
headlines.summary_en: If you’ve been waiting to try Apple’s revamped Siri without installing a developer beta, you now can. The company on Tuesday released the iOS 27 public beta, giving iPhone owners early access to its AI-powered assistant and other new features before the software’s official launch this fall.

headlines.title_cn: Anthropic’s newest ad is creeping people out
headlines.title_en: Anthropic’s newest ad is creeping people out
headlines.summary_cn: Anthropic has consistently attempted to depict itself as the ethical foil to other AI companies. This latest marketing stunt — which leans into criticism of AI as a way to make Anthropic seem aware of the responsibility it carries — would appear to be more of the same.
headlines.summary_en: Anthropic has consistently attempted to depict itself as the ethical foil to other AI companies. This latest marketing stunt — which leans into criticism of AI as a way to make Anthropic seem aware of the responsibility it carries — would appear to be more of the same.

headlines.title_cn: The founder of Hinge raised $18M to build a new AI dating service, Overtone
headlines.title_en: The founder of Hinge raised $18M to build a new AI dating service, Overtone
headlines.summary_cn: Overtone describes itself as "a voice- and audio-forward service, enabled by AI, that provides highly curated introductions."
headlines.summary_en: Overtone describes itself as "a voice- and audio-forward service, enabled by AI, that provides highly curated introductions."

items.title_cn: Google faces another AI training lawsuit from major publishers
items.title_en: Google faces another AI training lawsuit from major publishers
items.summary_cn: Hachette, Cengage, Elsevier, and other publishers allege that Google trained its AI on copyrighted works without the necessary permissions.
items.summary_en: Hachette, Cengage, Elsevier, and other publishers allege that Google trained its AI on copyrighted works without the necessary permissions.

items.title_cn: DeepMind CEO calls for an independent standards body to regulate frontier AI
items.title_en: DeepMind CEO calls for an independent standards body to regulate frontier AI
items.summary_cn: DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis is proposing an AI "standards body" modeled after FINRA, to test frontier models and develop best practices for their release.
items.summary_en: DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis is proposing an AI "standards body" modeled after FINRA, to test frontier models and develop best practices for their release.

items.title_cn: Meta’s Adam Mosseri says AI token budgets could soon be capped per engineer
items.title_en: Meta’s Adam Mosseri says AI token budgets could soon be capped per engineer
items.summary_cn: Instagram head Adam Mosseri believes companies will eventually need to manage AI token spending the same way they manage payroll or other operating expenses, predicting that engineers could soon face limits on how much they spend using AI tools.
items.summary_en: Instagram head Adam Mosseri believes companies will eventually need to manage AI token spending the same way they manage payroll or other operating expenses, predicting that engineers could soon face limits on how much they spend using AI tools.
